agent_result: Mercedes Sosa published 3 studio albums between 2000 and 2009 (inclusive): Corazón Libre (2005), Cantora 1 (2009), and Cantora 2 (2009).
question: How many studio albums were published by Mercedes Sosa between 2000 and 2009 (included)? You can use the latest 2022 version of english wikipedia.
full_query: How many studio albums were published by Mercedes Sosa between 2000 and 2009 (included)? You can use the latest 2022 version of english wikipedia.

- Path 1.1: Web search → crawl the top result  
  - Success: Retrieved the raw HTML of the Wikipedia page, specifically the “Discography” section containing a studio albums table/list with release years.  
- Path 1.2: Direct URL (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mercedes_Sosa#Discography) → crawl the section  
  - Success: Extracted the studio albums list directly from the discography anchor point, including all album titles and their years.

## Goal 2: Obtain the studio albums list from a 2022 archival snapshot of the same page  
- Path 2.1: Use the Internet Archive Wayback Machine with a date in 2022 (e.g., https://web.archive.org/web/20220000000000/https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mercedes_Sosa) → crawl the archived page

- Path 2.2: Find a specific Wikipedia revision ID from 2022 (via page history or oldid parameter) → crawl the page at `https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Mercedes_Sosa&oldid=XXXXX`  
  - Success: Retrieved the 2022 version of the page, yielding the studio albums list exactly as it was then.

After both goals complete, the extracted lists will be cross‑checked for consistency, then filtered to count only studio albums with release years between 2000 and 2009 inclusive. The final answer will be that count.

## Planning Guidance
1. Open the English Wikipedia page for Mercedes Sosa (latest 2022 version) and locate the "Discography" section, specifically the "Studio albums" list or table, which includes release years.  
2. Filter the listed studio albums to only those with a release year between 2000 and 2009 (inclusive), and count them.  
3. If the page does not explicitly separate studio albums, use the "Albums" subsection and cross-reference with reliable inline citations or the infobox to confirm each album's type and release date.

## Experience Guidance
To answer the current task, first navigate to the English Wikipedia page for Mercedes Sosa (using the 2022 version) and locate the "Discography" section, specifically the list of studio albums. Then filter the albums by release year, counting only those with release dates between 2000 and 2009 inclusive. Cross-check any ambiguous dates by clicking into the album's own page or referencing reliable sources listed there, ensuring you only include full studio albums (not compilations or live albums).

content.text:
New task:
How many studio albums were published by Mercedes Sosa between 2000 and 2009 (included)? You can use the latest 2022 version of english wikipedia.

————Memory System Guidance————
## Planning Guidance
1. Open the English Wikipedia page for Mercedes Sosa (latest 2022 version) and locate the "Discography" section, specifically the "Studio albums" list or table, which includes release years.  
2. Filter the listed studio albums to only those with a release year between 2000 and 2009 (inclusive), and count them.  
3. If the page does not explicitly separate studio albums, use the "Albums" subsection and cross-reference with reliable inline citations or the infobox to confirm each album's type and release date.

## Experience Guidance
To answer the current task, first navigate to the English Wikipedia page for Mercedes Sosa (using the 2022 version) and locate the "Discography" section, specifically the list of studio albums. Then filter the albums by release year, counting only those with release dates between 2000 and 2009 inclusive. Cross-check any ambiguous dates by clicking into the album's own page or referencing reliable sources listed there, ensuring you only include full studio albums (not compilations or live albums).
————End Memory————
Now, begin your planning analysis for this task!

[PLAN]:
## Goal 1: Extract studio albums list from the current English Wikipedia page for Mercedes Sosa  
- Path 1.1: Web search → crawl the top result  
  - Success: Retrieved the raw HTML of the Wikipedia page, specifically the “Discography” section containing a studio albums table/list with release years.  
- Path 1.2: Direct URL (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mercedes_Sosa#Discography) → crawl the section  
  - Success: Extracted the studio albums list directly from the discography anchor point, including all album titles and their years.

## Goal 2: Obtain the studio albums list from a 2022 archival snapshot of the same page  
- Path 2.1: Use the Internet Archive Wayback Machine with a date in 2022 (e.g., https://web.archive.org/web/20220000000000/https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mercedes_Sosa) → crawl the archived page  
  - Success: Retrieved the complete discography section as it existed in 2022, including the studio albums list.  
- Path 2.2: Find a specific Wikipedia revision ID from 2022 (via page history or oldid parameter) → crawl the page at `https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Mercedes_Sosa&oldid=XXXXX`  
  - Success: Retrieved the 2022 version of the page, yielding the studio albums list exactly as it was then.

After both goals complete, the extracted lists will be cross‑checked for consistency, then filtered to count only studio albums with release years between 2000 and 2009 inclusive. The final answer will be that count.
